module.name: wordcloud
module.description: A word cloud: words sized by weight, auto-coloured and lightly rotated — deterministic (same input → same layout). One "word weight" per line.
module.aiSpec:
A WORD CLOUD — words sized by weight, auto-coloured, a few gently rotated. Layout is deterministic (a hash of the word), so it never jumps between renders. Block module: one entry per line (sections merged): `word` weight 1, `word 8` weight 8 (any positive number; sizes are scaled to the range), `multi word 3` everything before a trailing number is the phrase. Params: `color` — single colour for every word instead of the auto palette (default "" = palette), `rotate` — allow a few words to be rotated 90° (default true; false → all horizontal), `scale` — overall size multiplier for every word (default 1; e.g. 1.4 = bigger), `align` — horizontal alignment of the flow: left | center (default) | right, `gap` — spacing between words, CSS gap shorthand (default "6px 4px"), `maxwidth` — max width of the cloud, any CSS length (default "620px"). Keep to ~30 words.
<!-- @wordcloud scale: 1.3 --> AI 10 Machine Learning 7 Data 6 Cloud 4 Python 3 <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Single color (optional)
param.desc: Use one colour for every word (blank = automatic multi-colour palette).

param.name: rotate
param.label: Allow rotated words
param.desc: Allow a few words to be rotated 90 degrees (false = all horizontal).

param.name: scale
param.label: Size scale
param.desc: Overall size multiplier applied to every word.

param.name: align
param.label: Alignment
param.desc: Horizontal alignment of the word flow.

param.name: gap
param.label: Word gap
param.desc: Spacing between words as a CSS gap shorthand, e.g. 6px 4px.

param.name: maxwidth
param.label: Max width
param.desc: Maximum width of the cloud, any CSS length, e.g. 620px or 40em.

snippet.label: Word cloud
snippet.text: <!-- @wordcloud --> AI 10 Machine Learning 7 Data 6 Cloud 4 Python 3 Edge 2 <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Words sized by trailing weight number; deterministic layout.
